what_it_does: Stores metadata for a channel attachment that points to a board item.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter with no body content.
It declares an attachment id, channel, attachment_type, target URI, and added timestamp.
target is a board:// URI referencing item-010dc561.
added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone offset.
standouts: The target is a board://item-010dc561 URI, making this a typed link to a board item.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a fixed set of metadata fields.
References external entities with a custom board:// URI scheme.
Records creation time in ISO 8601 UTC.
notes: A bare attachment ledger entry that links att-01c3b094 to board item item-010dc561 in the dragnet-development channel.
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose as an attachment metadata record matches the content: it records an attachment and its board-item target.
intention_signals: It appears intended to persist a typed association between a channel attachment and a specific board item so the relationship can be retrieved later.
contribution: Provides a persistent, timestamped, typed link between an attachment and a board item in the dragnet-development channel.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-only channel attachment metadata record in the dragnet-development channel that references board item item-010dc561 via a board:// URI.
intention_for_embedding: To record that attachment att-01c3b094 is associated with board item item-010dc561.
